All three acceptance-test requirements met: audible interruption/restart (Tommy at 215/219), Nate overshoot/trail-off (233), Cliff/Tommy cut-off (215/217). pass_summaries.summary: Resolved all three packet findings. Chapter 9 now exceeds the minimum word count, removes the repeated Lagavulin detail, and restructures the mid-deck stretch so the reveal produces an earlier, irreversible tactical split over what the group will tell Mallick.

Roughened the post-reveal deck debate in two spots to break composed, set-piece dialogue into pressured speech. Tommy's thesis-speech is interrupted by Cliff and restarts choppier; Cliff's epigrammatic lines are replaced with self-correcting speech; Nate's penalty-structure tag becomes an overshooting fumble that Tommy cuts off. All payoffs, must-land beats, and character voice signatures preserved.

Revised the deck exchange to stay locked in Joel's close third: the argument now carries spaced internal beats, Joel's live bodily and mental reactions, and concrete behavioral cues for each man's position instead of retrospective abstract labeling.
